ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., US Numeric, UK/AU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each size (e.g., US, UK, DE, etc.) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., numeric, alpha, etc.) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of sizes (e.g., men, women, kids, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being converted */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the size conversion applies */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the size conversion applies */,
  "size_conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of size conversion (e.g., numeric to alpha, etc.) */,
  "cotopaxi_size" TEXT /* Cotopaxi size value */,
  "xxs" TEXT /* XXS size value */,
  "xs" TEXT /* XS size value */,
  "s" TEXT /* S size value */,
  "m" TEXT /* M size value */,
  "l" TEXT /* L size value */,
  "xl" TEXT /* XL size value */,
  "2xl" TEXT /* 2XL size value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country (e.g., US, UK, DE, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region (e.g., North America, Europe, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, etc.) */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product (e.g., t-shirts, jeans, etc.) */,
  "product_size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes available for the product (e.g., S-XXL, etc.) */,
  "product_inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was last updated */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
